title: CoreThink Hybrid Strategy
thesis: Use local models for routine work and CoreThink for harder planning, security, and debugging work.
request: Can you share a projections plan as well, that includes pricing, customer acquisition channels, and customer growth over time?
answer: This plan shows pricing, customer channels, quarterly targets, budget, and the metrics to track.

hybrid_layers.name: Routine local work
hybrid_layers.description: Run frequent, lower-risk work on local models to keep cost down and protect privacy.

hybrid_layers.name: CoreThink for hard problems
hybrid_layers.description: Use CoreThink when the work needs deeper planning, debugging, security review, or synthesis.

hybrid_layers.name: Memory and controls
hybrid_layers.description: Keep history, review steps, and permissions visible so work stays clear and secure.

disclaimer: All projections are planning assumptions, not guaranteed performance.
